reviews.comment:
Me gustó el lugarcito, chico, tranquilo, buen café y era el único lugar abierto el domingo donde desayunar relativamente temprano un café.

(Translated by Google)
I liked the little place; it was small, quiet, had good coffee, and was the only place open on Sunday where I could have a relatively early breakfast.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18090789075875574973/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJcXFuUGJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Es un buen lugar para tomar un café, desayunar y también almorzar.
Venden comidas varias al peso, podés consumirlas en el local sin costo extra o llevartela..
La atención es muy buena, de parte de todas las chicas de turno.
Solo almuerzo, lamentablemente no se puede cenar.
También la parte de lubricantes está atendida con turnos y así evitar pérdida de tiempo. Muy conforme

(Translated by Google)
It's a good place to have coffee, breakfast, and lunch. They sell various foods by weight; you can eat them there at no extra cost or take them to go. The service is excellent, from all the staff on duty. They only serve lunch; unfortunately, dinner isn't available. The lubricant section is also staffed by appointment to avoid wasting time. Very satisfied.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18090789075875574973/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJM01DS1p3EAE

reviews.comment:
Se puede almorzar. Atención perfecta. Para criticar poco espacio para las mesas.

(Translated by Google)
Lunch is available. Service is excellent. The only criticism is the lack of table space.

reviews.comment:
Pueblo agradable y barato. En una panadería compre una docena de facturas. 60% más barato que en Bahía Blanca  y en vez de 12, son 14. En ACÁ tienen la poco higiénica orden de entregar una llave manoseado inevitablemente para los baños.

(Translated by Google)
A pleasant and inexpensive town. I bought a dozen pastries at a bakery. 60% cheaper than in Bahía Blanca, and instead of 12, there are 14. Here, they have the unhygienic order to provide an inevitably tampered key for the bathrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18090789075875574973/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBa1BMNjlnRRAB
